quality_highlights: workqueue-ops.md is exceptionally well-structured with four distinct queue strategies, clear code examples, idempotency table
run_install_scripts_validation.go has thorough package-level doc comments explaining security rationale and per-PM support matrix

single_file_improvements.issue: Warning message is a single dense run-on paragraph; breaking it into problem/risk/fix lines improves readability in terminal output
compile command Long help does not mention that output .lock.yml files should be committed to git
